room.caption: [BubTowerA1] Not a reference to Wolverine.

instance.creationCode: stringToShow="This will really mess with whoever decides to come here. I'll use my projectiles to flip this switch below me. HA, they'll never guess that enemy projectiles also affect those!#-Sparky" signSize=3
sprite_index=sInvisibleSolidMask image_xscale=3 xDir=1 yDir=0 shiftChange=48 spriteChange=13 towerColor=0
